datas.defText: *Are you sure you want to quit ?
*DARTHENSHMIRTZ IS CREATING A SITH-INATOR! YOU MUST STOP HIM BEFORE THE GALAXY IS DOOMED!
*You can't escape Agent P! please meet my giant normbot and my two anti-magnet antenas !!
*jump next to a wall to cling to it
*while clung to jump from a wall
*To steal a robot arm if close enough. Press again to fire.
*Jump next to a wall to cling to it
*Release all your friends. They will help you unlock doors.
*Collect all the tokens to earn extra points.
*Other agents can open locked doors for you.
*Don't touch the neon tubes or you'll get electrocuted!
*The shield protects you. Press spacebar to launch it.
